title: I Trust Wealth Beyond Market Moods
subtitle: An affirmation for staying settled when financial numbers outside your control move
excerpt: A brief affirmation from Day 68 of a 12-week money program. The statement separates trust in wealth from trust in daily market movement — useful when fluctuating numbers have been triggering anxiety about the long-term picture.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 68 reframe theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796).

practice.whenToUse: Use on days when a market dip, income variation, or dropping savings number has pulled your attention toward anxiety — when the short-term number is speaking louder than the long-term picture.

content.text: A brief affirmation from Day 68 of a 12-week money program. Day 68 works with the specific anxiety that financial fluctuations bring: the nervous system responds to a dip as if it were a collapse. The affirmation trains a longer view — trust in wealth as a pattern across years, not a reading taken day by day.
Say it three times, slowly. The second line is the specific reframe: wealth as a long-term direction, not a daily score.
I trust wealth beyond market moods. My prosperity grows over years, not days. I stay steady through the cycles.
Adapted from the Day 68 reframe theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
